description: Get input from file (Fortran unit number). This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr, string, flags = filein(lunit)

parameters.name: lunit
parameters.description: Fortran logical unit number of the file. (input).

return_values.name: flags
return_values.description: An array of two elements specifying the first element of flags is set to true if an end-of-file is encountered; the second element of flags is set to true if the file is closed after the read attempt. (output).
